justification: 0 Critical findings (pass). However, 1 Important finding ('Case-sensitive vehicleClass comparison') is an invented risk — the scenario states inputs are pre-validated, so speculating about future data sources violating casing guarantees is manufacturing a risk that doesn't exist. Verdict is SHIP (pass). Confidence >= 75 (pass). The Important finding pushes this to partial rather than pass, though the finding is at least arguable as a defense-in-depth observation.

observations.text: Correct SHIP verdict with no critical findings
High confidence level (95) with well-reasoned confidence areas
Production readiness assessment is thorough and accurate
Case-sensitivity finding elevated to Important when inputs are stated as pre-validated — this is an invented risk for a hypothetical future scenario
No logging/test absence flagged as findings
Suggestions are appropriately scoped as suggestions, not findings
